series_metadata.series_description: Confidential investigation cases and complaints closed by the Board. Cases may be closed because: 1.) They are without merit; 2.) Formal discipline was not initiated but an informal caution was issued; 3.) The licensee or applicant complied with all formal provisions of a disciplinary action.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Five years last recorded date of action. If a new case or complaint is received within that five year window older cases may be retained untill subsequent case is closed
